CustomField.description: Indicates that the Regulatory Answers must be either a Yes or No, only when one of the HSI Answers was Yes. Enforced during WO Complete, only if one or more of the conditions was met.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates that the Regulatory Answers must be either a Yes or No, only when one of the HSI Answers was Yes. Enforced during WO Complete, only if one or more of the conditions was met.
CustomField.label: Validation: Regulatory When HSI
